name: Docusate
description: Docusate is a laxative and stool softener used for the treatment of constipation and stimulation of bowel movement. It works by increasing the amount of water the stool absorbs in the gut, making the stool softer and easier to pass. It can be orally or rectally administered. It is on the World Health Organization's List of Essential Medicines, the most effective and safe medicines needed in a health system.
